home.title: OpenToolsKit - Browser Tools for Private Document Work

aboutPage.title: é—œæ–¼ {brand}
aboutPage.description: {brand} is an open-source browser tool platform that launches with {count}+ PDF tools, a workflow editor, and public source distribution.

mission.title: æˆ‘å€‘çš„ä½¿å‘½
mission.p1: We believe private browser tools should stay accessible, inspectable, and useful beyond a single file format. That is why {brand} has been shaped into a broader browser-tool platform.
mission.p2: Unlike traditional services that depend on remote processing for routine document work, {brand} keeps core flows in the browser where applicable and keeps source availability visible through a public AGPL repository.
mission.p3: The current public site focuses on PDF tools, workflow editing, and source-visible browser utilities while preparing the platform for additional tool families.
